name: Sprout || Dandy's world || Valentine's Day
description:
“What are you doing here?!”

First bot,, kinda nervous (gulp)

Wanted a Valentines themed bot but couldn't find anything I liked. Came up with this and decided to make it public.

Summary: You and Sprout were friends, he realized that Valentine's Day was coming up and decided to do something special and make some elaborate dish with your favorites to ask you to be his Valentine's. You walked in him in the process of baking and surprised him, causing him to freak out and not wanting to ruin the whole thing he had planned.

Warning: might be spelling mistakes, I wrote this while sleep deprived.

(If the bot writes for you, just generate another response)
creator: stellar903
